feature_evidence.json: Feature report listing OCR, session, and theme-related changes with associated files and metadata.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing prewritten summaries of various frontend source files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base/theme config defining purple OKLCH palettes, global styles, and print formatting rules.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entrypoint loading the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main router setup defining all app routes wrapped in MockStoreProvider.
frontend/src/components/ai/FloatingAIBut: Floating circular button that navigates to the AI page and exposes a coachmark target.
frontend/src/components/editor/AddQuesti: Dialog for creating a new question heading with title and planned count inputs.
frontend/src/components/editor/AutoGrowT: Auto-resizing textarea component that adjusts height based on content within min/max row limits.
frontend/src/components/editor/FloatingR: Draggable desktop floating toolbox for selecting sections, headings, and adding questions to a paper.
frontend/src/components/editor/MobileRea: Mobile FAB version of the floating toolbox with a bottom sheet UI for section, heading, and question creation.
frontend/src/components/editor/RealPaper: Sidebar toolbox for selecting a section and adding different question types to a paper.
Coachmark spotlight highlighting the real paper toolbox with positioning logic and dismiss controls.
Main app layout handling routing, initialization flow, navigation drawer, and global coachmarks.
frontend/src/components/navigation/Navig: Side drawer with navigation links, profile info, and new paper creation using the mock store.
frontend/src/components/onboarding/Coach: Displays a coachmark overlay positioned relative to a target DOM element with retry, fallback, and navigation controls.
frontend/src/components/paper/PaperActio: Provides an overflow menu for printing, exporting, sharing, and previewing a paper.
frontend/src/components/paper/PaperRende: Renders a question in print-friendly form based on its type and associated data.
frontend/src/components/paper/PaperSurfa: Displays a full paper layout with header, sections, editing mode, and navigation for adding or editing questions.
frontend/src/components/paper/QuestionBl: Editable form for modifying a question’s text and type‑specific fields, with auto‑focus support.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor, refetching dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCoachmarks.ts: Controls onboarding coachmark flow, tracking active step and exposing navigation actions.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebouncedEffect.ts: Provides a hook that delays running an effect until dependencies stop changing for a set time.
frontend/src/hooks/useDraggableFloatingP: Implements draggable panel behavior with optional viewport constraints and persistent position storage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Sets up a context and provider for Internet Identity login, identity persistence, and auth state management.
frontend/src/hooks/useRealPaperToolboxSp: Tracks whether a toolbox spotlight has been completed using localStorage and exposes show/complete/reset state.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Manages light, dark, or system theme preferences with localStorage persistence and applies theme classes.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base layers and custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, including print styles.
frontend/src/lib/ai/mockQuestionGenerato: Generates deterministic mock questions based on topic, marks, difficulty, and templates.
frontend/src/lib/editor/sectionInsertCon: Stores, retrieves, and clears the context for inserting sections using localStorage.
frontend/src/lib/ocr/extractedTextQuesti: Parses raw OCR text into structured questions using patterns for question marks, numbering, bullets, and keywords, with sentence-based fallback. Also provides stats on confidence levels.
frontend/src/lib/ocr/mockOcrExtractor.ts: Generates mock OCR extraction sessions, converts parsed questions into app format, and saves/loads them from localStorage. Also supports converting approved OCR questions into personal questions.
frontend/src/lib/ocr/ocrSpaceClient.ts: Client for OCR.space that validates files, converts them to base64, sends API requests, and returns extracted text or detailed errors. Handles rate limits, size checks, and unsupported formats.
frontend/src/lib/papers/createNewPaper.t: Creates a new Paper object using profile defaults with preset marks, timing, layout, and metadata.
frontend/src/lib/storage/safeStorage.ts: Provides safe wrappers around localStorage with availability checks and error handling. Caches detection results and exposes get/set/remove helpers.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, wrapping it with React Query and Internet Identity providers before rendering.
frontend/src/pages/ai/AIPreferencesWiref: UI for generating AI-based questions with configurable parameters, editing options, selection toggles, and inserting results into a paper. Integrates with mock store and section insertion context.
frontend/src/pages/auth/LoginWireframe.t: Login screen supporting Internet Identity and guest mode with redirects based on onboarding state. Uses mock store and displays status messaging.
Loads and displays saved drafts from localStorage with error handling for storage issues and navigation options.
frontend/src/pages/editor/PaperEditorWir: Provides a paper metadata and section editor with autosave, section management, and debounced updates to mock store.
frontend/src/pages/editor/QuestionEntryW: Lets users create a new question, auto‑save it to personal questions, and insert it into the appropriate paper section.
frontend/src/pages/editor/RealPaperEdito: Full paper editor for real layout, enabling question creation by type, section/heading selection, autosaving, and toolbox UI.
frontend/src/pages/export/ExportPrintPre: Shows print/export preview with layout mode switching, cleanup dialog, and navigation back to editor or papers list.
frontend/src/pages/home/HomeDashboardWir: Home dashboard showing welcome info, quick actions, and recent papers with navigation and paper creation logic.
frontend/src/pages/ocr/OCRReviewApproveW: Displays OCR-extracted questions for approval, editing, or rejection, handles insertion into the question bank, and manages extraction failure states.
frontend/src/pages/ocr/OCRUploadWirefram: Allows users to upload images or PDFs, performs OCR extraction, handles errors, and saves session data before navigating to review.
frontend/src/pages/onboarding/Onboarding: Intro screen guiding users into an interactive tutorial or letting them skip onboarding and proceed to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/papers/GeneratedPaper: Lists generated papers with options to edit, export, or delete, and provides navigation back to home.
frontend/src/pages/profile/ProfileWirefr: Profile form allowing teachers to edit default personal and institute details used for new paper creation.
frontend/src/pages/questionBank/Question: UI for browsing starter and personal questions, selecting a tab, and inserting a chosen question into a specific paper section.
frontend/src/pages/settings/SettingsWire: Settings page allowing theme selection, tutorial reset, and clearing all app data via the mock store.
frontend/src/state/mockData.ts: Defines mock interfaces and sample data for profiles, questions, papers, and starter questions.
frontend/src/state/mockStore.tsx: Implements a React context store handling user state, papers, questions, persistence, and normalization of stored papers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration specifying theme extensions, color tokens, animations, and plugin setup.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing required OCR replacement, theme update tasks, and existing feature definitions.
